title: Load monthly calendar dashboard and confirm schedule content is visible
description: Verifies the main monthly calendar view loads and shows shift slot labels for days in the month.

title: Navigate to next month using the right arrow
description: Verifies month navigation forward updates the visible month on the calendar.

steps.description: Click on the "Next month" right arrow button

title: Navigate to previous month using the left arrow
description: Verifies month navigation backward updates the visible month on the calendar.

steps.description: Click on the "Previous month" left arrow button

title: Open shift assignment panel by clicking a day cell
description: Verifies selecting a day opens the shift assignment panel for that date.

steps.description: Click on a visible day cell in the calendar grid
Verify element "Shift assignment panel" is visible

title: Close shift assignment panel after opening it
description: Verifies the shift assignment panel can be dismissed after being opened from a day cell.

steps.description: Click on a visible day cell in the calendar grid
Verify element "Shift assignment panel" is visible
Click on the "Close" button in the shift assignment panel
Verify element "Shift assignment panel" is not visible

title: Toggle from calendar view to list view
description: Verifies the view toggle switches from the calendar grid to a list representation of shifts.

steps.description: Verify element "Calendar grid" is not visible

title: Toggle from list view back to calendar view
description: Verifies the view toggle switches back to the monthly calendar grid after using list view.

steps.description: Verify element "Shift list" is not visible

title: Assign a person to a shift slot and save successfully
description: Verifies a user can select a day, assign a person to a slot, and persist the change with a visible confirmation/state update.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Search for a person by name in the assignment panel
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Click Save button to persist changes

title: Remove an existing assignment using the trash icon and save
description: Verifies a user can clear a previously assigned person from a slot and persist the removal.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Click Save button to persist changes
Click trash icon to remove an assignment
Click Save button to persist changes

title: Switch selected day and verify the assignment panel updates to the newly selected day
description: Verifies changing the selected calendar day updates visible assignment details (day-specific context) in the panel.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Click on a different calendar day to select it
Verify element "selected day indicator" is visible

title: Search for a person by name and verify results are shown in the assignment panel
description: Verifies the user can filter/find personnel using search before making an assignment.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Search for a person by name in the assignment panel
Verify element "person search results list" is visible
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Verify element "assigned person in slot" is visible

title: Attempt to save with no changes and verify the UI handles it gracefully
description: Verifies clicking Save without making assignment changes does not break the UI and shows a clear status/confirmation.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Click Save button to persist changes

title: Invalid assignment error: UI shows validation error and does not apply assignment
description: Verifies when an invalid person selection is attempted and the save fails, the UI displays an error and the assignment is not shown as applied.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Search for a person by name in the assignment panel
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Click Save button to persist changes
Verify element "assigned person in slot" is not visible

title: Cancel out of an in-progress change by switching days before saving
description: Verifies that unsaved changes are not incorrectly persisted when the user changes the selected day without saving.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Verify element "assigned person in slot" is visible
Click on a different calendar day to select it
Click on the original calendar day to select it
Verify element "assigned person in slot" is not visible

title: Assign to one slot, then reassign to a different person, and save
description: Verifies updating an existing slot assignment to a new person persists correctly and reflects the latest selection.

steps.description: Click on a calendar day to select it
Search for a person by name in the assignment panel
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Search for a person by name in the assignment panel
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Click Save button to persist changes

title: Generate schedule for the current month (mode: all) and apply to calendar
description: Verifies a user can run the solver for the selected month in 'all slots' mode and see the generated shifts applied on the calendar.

steps.description: Select "All slots" from the solve mode options
Click on "Generate" to run the solver
Verify element "Apply to calendar" is visible

title: Generate schedule for the current month (mode: all) and save results
description: Verifies a user can generate a schedule and save it so the calendar reflects saved generated shifts.

steps.description: Select "All slots" from the solve mode options
Click on "Generate" to run the solver
Verify element "Save generated schedule" is visible

title: Generate schedule using partial mode and apply to calendar
description: Verifies a user can run the solver in 'partial' mode and apply the generated result to update the calendar.

steps.description: Select "Partial" from the solve mode options
Click on "Generate" to run the solver

title: Cancel out of the solver dialog without generating
description: Verifies the user can open the solver UI and close it without generating or applying any schedule.

title: Solver failure shows an error message and guidance to adjust rules
description: Verifies that when the solver fails, the UI shows a solver error message and suggests adjusting rules/constraints.

steps.description: Select "All slots" from the solve mode options
Click on "Generate" to run the solver

title: After solver failure, user can navigate to Settings to adjust rules
description: Verifies the error state does not block the user from going to Settings to adjust constraints after a solver failure.

steps.description: Click on "Generate" to run the solver
Click on "Settings" in the app navigation

title: Generated preview is visible before applying or saving
description: Verifies that after generating, the UI presents a preview state and does not immediately apply changes until the user confirms apply/save.

steps.description: Select "All slots" from the solve mode options
Click on "Generate" to run the solver
Verify element "Apply to calendar" is visible
Verify element "Save generated schedule" is visible

title: Re-run solver to regenerate a different preview without saving
description: Verifies the user can run the solver again from the solver UI to regenerate the preview before choosing to apply/save.

steps.description: Select "All slots" from the solve mode options
Click on "Generate" to run the solver
Click on "Generate" to run the solver

title: Smart Import modal opens from Calendar dashboard
description: Verifies the Smart Import entry point is available on the calendar and opens the Smart Import modal.

title: Smart Import shows ready state when Gemini is available
description: Verifies the UI indicates Smart Import is ready when Gemini status is available.

title: Smart Import blocks processing when no image is provided
description: Verifies attempting to run Smart Import without providing an image results in a visible validation/error message and no shifts are applied.

title: Gemini unavailable: Smart Import shows explanation and disables action
description: Verifies when Gemini is unavailable (or API key missing), the UI shows an explanation and prevents Smart Import from running.

title: Open Schedule History modal from the calendar dashboard
description: Verifies the History modal can be opened from the main calendar dashboard.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal

title: Save current schedule as a new version and see it in the versions list
description: Verifies saving a new version adds an entry to the history list with the provided name.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal
Click on "Save current schedule as a new version"
Type "Mar 2026 snapshot" into the version name field

title: Saved version entry shows a visible timestamp in the list
description: Verifies each saved version displays a timestamp in the history list for traceability.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal
Scroll to the versions list area

title: Restore a previous version from the history list
description: Verifies selecting a version triggers a restore flow and the UI reflects that the version was restored.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal
Click on "Save current schedule as a new version"
Type "Restore test snapshot" into the version name field
Click the version named "Restore test snapshot" to restore it

title: Cancel out of history modal without restoring a version
description: Verifies the user can close the History modal without making changes.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal
Verify element "History modal" is not visible

title: Attempt to save a version with an empty name shows validation error
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving a version when required fields are missing and surfaces an error message.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal
Click on "Save current schedule as a new version"
Verify text "Name is required" is visible
Verify element "Version name field" is visible

title: History list remains accessible after saving a version (no page break)
description: Verifies that after saving a version, the History modal remains usable and the list is still visible.

steps.description: Click the History button to open the history modal
Click on "Save current schedule as a new version"
Type "Post-save usability" into the version name field

title: Open the Violation Panel from the calendar dashboard
description: Verifies the user can open the Violation Panel from the main calendar dashboard.

title: Close the Violation Panel using the Violations toggle
description: Verifies the user can close the Violation Panel after opening it.

steps.description: Verify element "Violation Panel" is not visible

title: Violation list renders with rule and severity indicators
description: Verifies violations (when present) are shown as a list with rule name and severity visible.

title: Clicking a violation highlights the offending day in the calendar
description: Verifies selecting a violation focuses/highlights the day referenced by that violation.

steps.description: Click the first violation in the list

title: Selecting different violations updates the highlighted day
description: Verifies clicking a second violation changes the highlighted day, indicating the locator updates correctly.

steps.description: Click the first violation in the list
Click a different violation in the list

title: No violations state is shown when there are no results
description: Verifies the panel shows a clear empty state when there are no violations to display.

steps.description: Verify element "violations list" is not visible

title: Invalid month format results in no violations shown and an error message
description: Verifies that when the violations request fails due to invalid month input, the UI shows no violations and displays a helpful error.

title: Correcting an invalid month input updates violations list successfully
description: Verifies the user can correct the month input after an error and see violations update accordingly.

title: Add a new person with basic details and save
description: Verifies a user can add a new team member with name, color, and call tag and see them in the list.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Select a color from the color selector

title: Add a new person with targets and unavailable dates
description: Verifies a user can set target shift counts and mark unavailable dates before saving a person.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Type "10" into the total target shifts field
Type "2" into the holiday target shifts field
Type "8" into the weekday target shifts field
Mark unavailable dates on the mini calendar
Verify the unavailable date indicator is visible on the mini calendar

title: Cancel adding a person discards changes
description: Verifies clicking Cancel closes the add form and does not create a new person.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Type "Temp Person" into the name field
Select a color from the color selector
Verify element "Add Person button" is visible
Verify text "Temp Person" is not visible

title: Edit an existing person’s name and save
description: Verifies a user can edit a person card and the updated name is shown after saving.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Click Edit icon on a person card to edit them
Type "Jordan K" into the name field

title: Edit a person’s call tags and targets
description: Verifies a user can update call tag assignment and target shift counts for an existing person.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Click Edit icon on a person card to edit them
Type "12" into the total target shifts field

title: Delete a person removes them from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete a person and the person no longer appears in the personnel list.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Type "Delete Me" into the name field
Click Delete icon to remove a person
Verify text "Delete Me" is not visible

title: Block creating a duplicate person and show conflict error
description: Verifies the UI prevents creating a duplicate person and displays a visible conflict/error message.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Click Add Person button to open the add form

title: Validation: attempt to save with missing required name
description: Verifies the add form blocks saving when required fields (name) are missing and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Verify element "Add Person form" is visible

title: Create a new scheduling rule and see it listed
description: Verifies a user can create a new constraint rule from Settings and it appears in the rules list.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value

title: Cancel out of new rule creation without saving
description: Verifies leaving the new rule form without saving does not add the rule to the list.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value
Verify text "New Rule" is not visible

title: Validation: Attempt to save a rule with missing required fields
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when required fields (such as name/value) are missing and shows a visible prompt.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form

title: Validation: Reject invalid condition/value entry and prompt correction
description: Verifies the UI rejects an invalid condition/value combination and prompts the user to correct the rule.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value

title: Edit an existing rule and verify updated values are shown
description: Verifies a user can edit a rule and see the updated condition/value reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value
Click Edit icon on a rule to modify it
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value

title: Delete a rule and verify it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete an existing rule and it no longer appears in the UI.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value
Click Delete icon to remove a rule

title: Rules persist after page refresh (state reload)
description: Verifies that a saved rule still appears after reloading the Settings page (reflecting a state reload).

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value

title: Create two distinct rules and verify both are listed
description: Verifies multiple constraint rules can be created and displayed simultaneously without overwriting each other.

steps.description: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value
Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value

title: View Thai holidays list on Settings page
description: Verifies that the Settings page displays a visible Thai holidays section/list after loading.

title: Reload holiday data successfully updates the list view
description: Verifies that clicking Reload refreshes holiday data and the holidays list remains visible after refresh.

title: Holiday dates appear highlighted on the monthly calendar after viewing Settings
description: Verifies that holidays influence the calendar UI by showing a visible holiday highlight/marker in the main calendar after visiting Settings.

title: Holiday name is visible in Settings list entries
description: Verifies that each holiday entry shows a readable holiday name (not just a date).

title: Load Cumulative dashboard and display shift counts table
description: Verifies the cumulative dashboard loads successfully and shows the personnel shift counts table.

steps.description: Verify element "table of personnel with monthly shift counts" is visible
Verify element "Expand row control" is visible

title: View deficit/surplus badges for personnel in cumulative table
description: Verifies deficit/surplus indicators are visible for personnel in the cumulative view.

steps.description: Verify element "table of personnel with monthly shift counts" is visible
Verify element "deficit/surplus badges per person" is visible
Verify element "deficit/surplus badges per person" is visible

title: Expand a person row to view month-by-month breakdown
description: Verifies expanding a row reveals the month-by-month breakdown details for a person.

steps.description: Verify element "table of personnel with monthly shift counts" is visible
Click on "Expand" for the first personnel row
Click on "Expand" for the first personnel row
Verify element "month-by-month breakdown" is not visible

title: Select a month to finalize and verify selection is reflected in UI
description: Verifies a user can select a month to finalize and the UI reflects the chosen month.

steps.description: Verify element "Select a month to finalize" is visible

title: Attempt to finalize without selecting a month shows validation feedback
description: Verifies the UI prevents finalization when no month is selected and shows a clear validation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Select a month" is visible
Verify element "Month to finalize" is visible
